channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Abandoned bike frame, 5th April
item.description:
No wheels

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Brixton Road, Oval, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped bread crates, 5th April
item.description:
Broken bread crates dumped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Prima Road, Oval, Greater London

item.title: Faded white lines, 5th April
item.description:
The stop lines, they have broken paint lines.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New North Road, Islington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamp post knocked over laying in the road after an RTC, 5th April
item.description:
A lamp post has been knocked over and is laying in the road after being hit by a car
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Light out in shelter, 5th April
item.description:
Light out in shelter, Shortlands Rd, Shortlands, southbound, opp jct with The Glen. It has been out at least a week.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shortlands Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sticker on lampost, 5th April
item.description:
Sticker on lampost
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bellegrove Road, Welling, Greater London

item.title: Fly tipping in bins for flats, 4th April
item.description:
Someone was fly tipping here
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crewys Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Knocked down traffic sign, 4th April
item.description:
Traffic sign knocked down possibly by a vehicle on Finchley Road alitinay@gmail.com the junction with Portsdown Avenue NW11

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1013, Finchley Road, Temple Fortune, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping all along the road, 4th April
item.description:
Tyres, old car parts, bags of rubbish littered all along the road
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nathan Way, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegally parked vehicle no number plate, 4th April
item.description:
This vehicle with no number plate keeps parking here, I believe it’s part of a organised crime The drive lives at 10 Morriss house Cherry garden street Se16 4pq He drive and parks with no number plate so he can’t get a tick or get fined when he drive in congestion and parks without paying for a permit or pay to park

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cherry Garden Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: All street lights off Crayford High Street, 4th April
item.description:
Very dark on the hill, no street lights working. Cars driving fast so could be an accident waiting to happen.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, London Road, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree from London Field's park fallen into garden, 4th April
item.description:
Tree from London fields park has fallen into my garden causing extensive damage to my boundary wall, the wall is unsafe, I can see a section in unattached and balanced in place and poses a health and safety risk for pets and walkers using the nature area.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lansdowne Drive, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: In front of 112 Glengall Road, 4th April
item.description:
Street light not working - completely dark in this area
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glengall Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The road surface level differs after the drain and needs inspecting, 4th April
item.description:
The road surface level differs after the drain and needs inspecting to see if remedial action is required to repair the road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Langley Gardens, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lamp/sign cover needs replacing, 4th April
item.description:
It has fallen out leaving electrics exposed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ravensdon Street, Kennington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Street Light - Equipment damaged, pole leaning

item.title: Norwood Road SE27 9AA number 356, 4th April
item.description:
Norwood Road SE27 9AA number 356 (Fight for Sight shop) ‘blue’ shop front wall graffiti tagged. Please forward fixmystreet.com link to your contractor for reporting pin &, picture.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 356, Norwood Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 19 / 21 tree kerbside, 4th April
item.description:
Cement kerb replacement by tree crumbling

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): The Avenue, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Knights Hill SE27 white road markings are ‘ghost’ markings bet, 4th April
item.description:
Knights Hill SE27 white road markings are ‘ghost’ markings between number 2 to number 10 Knights Hill - – picture attached.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Knight's Hill, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
